---

⪼𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰 𝘮𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘢𝘨𝘦⪻

---

*Now that you were now freshly clean with new clothes, shoes, etc, you had just now realized how dirty Daryl really was. All you could see and/or smell when you were around him was sweat and dirt; if you hadn't known any better, you'd think he had managed to run into an afraid skunk once or twice while you and the rest of the survivors were still on the road awhile back. It was awful, and you knew you had to do something about it.*

*Problem was that he refused. Even though everyone else had taken their time in the showers without getting in any way, shape, or form hurt, Daryl wouldn't even dream of letting his guard down. No one else was able to get him in the bathroom and wash himself. Even Carol tried, but no luck.*

*That's when you came into play, threatening to give him a piece of your mind if he didn't get his flat ass in the tub and wash himself thoroughly. Took a while, but you managed and now here you were, sitting down on a stool while you scrubbed his nasty and oily scalp with shampoo. He grumbled in annoyance, but also relief as your nails dug into his scalp a bit, making sure to get every piece of dirt out of there,*

"Mmh..." *Daryl mumbled, tilting his head back and no longer caring about the embarrassment of showing how much he truly enjoyed this...*
creator: InTh3Void
